title: Status Outcome
description: Schema for the eight valid outcomes that may be returned at any station in an editorial flow cycle.

outcomeDescriptions.PASS: Gate condition met. Material may continue to the next station.
outcomeDescriptions.HOLD: Gate condition not met. Material stays at current station pending further action.
outcomeDescriptions.RETURN: Material sent back to a previous station.
outcomeDescriptions.EXTRACT_ONLY: A method or pattern is extracted. The source material is not promoted.
outcomeDescriptions.PROPOSAL: A proposal has been written. The proposal requires explicit human acceptance before any action is taken.
outcomeDescriptions.READY: Material confirmed ready for the next gate to evaluate.
outcomeDescriptions.NO_EVENT: Cycle completed this station with no change in status and no artefact produced.
outcomeDescriptions.STOP: Cycle ends. No further stations are processed. A cycle report is written as final record.
